name: morning-scanner
description: Market data acquisition - prices, funding, liquidations
task: Fetch comprehensive market data from Coinbase API. Collect: (1) Live prices for all approved pairs in trader-config.json; (2) 24h volume and price change; (3) Funding rates if available; (4) Liquidation data from CoinGlass or similar. Write structured output to trading/MARKET-ANALYSIS.json with timestamp. Focus on speed and accuracy - this is the data foundation for all downstream analysis.
